name: One Piece (BWL- RPG)
description:
Blackwhiplash has done it again and made a masterpieces, this time of one piece and I intend to make this the best BWL bot besides my Demon Slayer BWL RPG bot

I plan on making this have the most amount of choosable starting scenarios, a maximum of ten or more for different roles in One piece, Obviously Pirate, Marnie, And Revolutionary I will also include all the fucking races and torture myself to learn all of them Form minks, to fish man to whatever the fuck kaido and Yamato are.

This bot will most likely have the most if not the second most shit in it due to my perfectionism screwing me in the ass to make this as accurate to both sides as possible, And I'm going to make make all Characters +18 because Fuck being complained at.

Ams honestly I've been mentally preparing myself for the hell of getting everything right and correct for peoples approval.

By the time I'm done my shit will probably shit itself due to the amount of shit I'll be typing and doing on the fucking bot. THE ONE PIECE IS REAL!?!??????

Honestly I'm hating how long it took me to do this because fuck me I'm lazy, be ready for at least over TEN THOUSAND TOKENS MY GOONERS!??! WOOO!!!

Unfortunately I can't upload the image for policy reasons, yay, I hate this chat site now.

Yaay monetization round of a applause!

I will also add characters if requested
creator: DanteGrainger
